runTitle: Local Nivo Chart Visual QA - WSL2 /mnt/d SIGBUS Blocked
coveredSurfaces: local Next.js dev server startup attempts
skippedSurfaces: storage-nfs-dc1-01 performance tab hover tooltip visual verification
notes: Playwright visual QA was not executed because local Next.js dev/build repeatedly crashed on WSL2 /mnt/d with SIGBUS.

Evidence: npm run storybook:smoke exited 135 with Bus error; next dev Turbopack and webpack exited before readiness; npm run build exited without stdout and dmesg recorded Node/next-server fatal signal 7.
Attempted ext4 workaround by rsyncing to /tmp, but /mnt/d large-file traversal was too slow for this QA pass and was aborted cleanly.
Deterministic gates still passed: type-check, lint, test:quick, docs:budget, docs:ai-consistency, git diff --check, ci:gitlab:check.
